# MuleSoft MUnit

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.7) of MUnit documentation.
> See [MUnit llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/munit/llms-full.txt) for all the MUnit documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Assert Equals](https://docs.mulesoft.com/munit/latest/assertion-equals-processor.md)
- [Assert That Event Processor](https://docs.mulesoft.com/munit/latest/assertion-event-processor.md)
- [Assert Expression](https://docs.mulesoft.com/munit/latest/assertion-expression-processor.md)
